metadata.title: Pittaya - Future of Digital Experiences
metadata.description: Brutal tools for brutal problems. Creating tools that empower the next generation of digital creators.

hero.announcement: New: AM I ON? is now live!
hero.description: We build tools that bridge functionality and luxury. Experience the next generation of development with Pittaya.

products.title: Tools for the
products.description: Discover our suite of products designed to empower developers and businesses with modern solutions.

pittayaUI.title: Pittaya UI
pittayaUI.description: A completely open-source UI library built for React. Powered by Tailwind CSS, Radix primitives, and TypeScript. It is the foundation of beauty in web development.

amIOn.title: AM I ON?
amIOn.quote: Purge downtime from the face of the earth.
amIOn.description: Extreme monitoring for developers who refuse to accept failure. Brutal tools for brutal problems. No cute emails, just alerts that force you to act.

pittayaTheme.title: Pittaya Theme
pittayaTheme.description: A minimalist theme for VSCode, Cursor, Windsurf, and other VSCode-based IDEs. Built by the Pittaya team, featuring elegant dark and light modes. Open-source and ready for contributions. With 500+ downloads across all marketplaces and support for the most popular technologies including Go, Python, React, TypeScript, JavaScript, HTML, and CSS.

alexChen.name: Alex Chen
alexChen.text: Pittaya UI saved us weeks of development time. The components are not just functional, they are stunning.

sarahMiller.name: Sarah Miller
sarahMiller.text: AM I ON? is the only monitoring tool that wakes me up when it actually matters. No false positives. Pure efficiency.

davidK.name: David K.
davidK.text: The attention to detail in every Pittaya product is unmatched. It feels premium, it feels robust.

team.title: Who is Behind the business?
team.description: During the working process, we perform regular fitting with the client because he is the only person who can feel whether a new suit fits or not.

footer.description: Brutal tools for brutal problems. Creating tools that empower the next generation of digital creators.
